notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Chase DeLauter scores. Rhys Hoskins scores. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Chase DeLauter scores. Rhys Hoskins scores. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.

notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Mickey Gasper out at home on the throw, left fielder Angel Martínez to catcher Patrick Bailey.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Chase DeLauter scores. Rhys Hoskins scores. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
